sources.name: Finanstilsynet Forskrifter (Regulations)
sources.completeness_note: 86 forskrifter covering capital adequacy, anti-money laundering, insurance solvency, securities trading, payment services

sources.name: Finanstilsynet Rundskriv (Circulars)
sources.completeness_note: 55 rundskriv covering ICT security expectations, internal control, AML/CFT supervisory letters, risk management

sources.name: Finanstilsynet Veiledninger (Guidance)
sources.completeness_note: 59 veiledninger covering compliance guidance, outsourcing, fitness and propriety, reporting instructions

sources.name: Finanstilsynet Enforcement Actions
sources.completeness_note: 36 enforcement actions including administrative fines, licence revocations, restrictions, and public warnings
